DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-15-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS RICHARD MENDRIBIL, GARY MENDRIBIL, RICHARD MENDRIBIL, JR., AND TERI FOWLER'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is overruled in its entirety. Plaintiffs adequately allege claims for which the civil division of this court has jurisdiction. Plaintiffs also adequately plead damages and a claim for legal malpractice against Ms. Fowler based on a duty allegedly owed to their grandfather. ORDER SIGNED.
